---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Christopher Wordsworth DD"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Christopher Wordsworth DD

**Dates:**   (1807-1885)

### Description

Bishop of Lincoln

### Biography

He married (6 December 1838) Susanna Hatley Frere (1811-1884);  he was father of Elizabeth Wordsworth, brother of the Rt. Rev. Charles Wordsworth, and nephew of the poet. [LG 1952, LG 1871]

### Letters

- Letter from March 28th [1884] 
- Letter from 14 May 1872
- Letter from May 11 [1872]
- Letter from May 17th 1871

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
